payload.answer: Required eval accounting fields: (1) token_counts: input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens; (2) provider/model_ids: provider_id, model_id; (3) estimated_price: derived from tokens × provider rates; (4) latency_percentiles: p50, p90, p95 milliseconds
payload.decision: Commit structured memory cards capturing token accounting dimensions with relationships to provider/model context

entity_resolution.reason: Fixture establishes durable accounting field requirements for eval system

payload.intent: Document required evaluation accounting fields for cost, latency, and token metrics in Brain memory system

memory_cards.statement: Token count accounting requires input_tokens, output_tokens, and total_tokens fields for cost and usage tracking
Provider and model identification fields enable cost calculation and performance attribution across different LLM services
Estimated price field captures cost derived from token counts and provider pricing rates
Latency percentiles (p50, p90, p95) measure response time distribution for performance evaluation and SLA tracking
